_comment: Coverage floors enforced by scripts/check-coverage.ts against the `All files` row of Bun's text coverage reporter. `packages` keys (path prefixes) declare per-package floors checked against the average of matching per-file rows. Baselined from `bun test --coverage` against the current tree; each floor sits ~1pt below observed. The ratchet only goes UP — raise floors as coverage improves; lowering requires deleting tests, which should be a conscious decision with a tracker reference. The script never auto-edits this file: loosening requires an explicit commit by a human.
